results.title: Off-Campus Season 2 Expected: Cast, Release Date, OTT Platform — Here’s All You Need To Know
results.description: Amazon Prime Video confirms Off-Campus Season 2 with returning stars, fresh cast additions, and a major romance shift. Dean and Allie take center stage as production gears up for a possible mid-2027 release packed with drama, hockey, and emotional twists. The post Off-Campus Season 2 Expected: Cast, Release Date, OTT Platform — Here’s All You Need To Know appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: Khan Withdraws from Falta Repoll; TMC Alleges Pressure
results.description: Summary: Jahangir Khan, the Trinamool Congress candidate, withdrew his nomination from the Falta constituency in West Bengal on Tuesday, just before the re-polls scheduled for May 21st after the Election Commission’s cancellation of the initial voting. Key Points Jahangir Khan stated that West Bengal chief minister Suvendu Adhikari promised a special package for Falta’s development [...]

results.title: Naslen-starrer ‘Mollywood Times’ locks in a new release date; makers drop official update
results.description: The makers of ‘Mollywood Times’ have officially confirmed a new release date after the film’s earlier schedule shifted.
